intro.1: These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern access to and use of the Triad Tactics website (the “Site”). By accessing or using the Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
intro.2: The Site is a non-commercial community website for players of the Arma video game. It exists solely to support participation in the community and is not offered as a source of factual or professional information.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: If you do not accept these Terms in full, you must not access or use the Site. Continued use of the Site constitutes acceptance of the current version of the Terms.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be legally able to enter into a binding agreement under applicable law to use the Site. If you use the Site on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

milsim.title: 3. Video game context and non-endorsement
milsim.body: The Site relates to a video game community centered on Arma. Any references to military themes are part of a fictional or historical gameplay setting. The Site does not endorse, glorify, or promote real-world violence, armed conflict, political extremism, or any real military activity.

responsibility.title: 4. User content and responsibility
responsibility.body: You are solely responsible for any text, images, files, links, or other materials you submit or publish on the Site (“User Content”). The Site administration does not review or pre-approve all User Content and does not assume liability for it.

list.1: You bear full legal responsibility for your User Content and any consequences arising from it.
list.2: You must ensure your User Content is accurate, lawful, and does not mislead others.
list.3: You must obtain all necessary rights and permissions to publish your User Content.
list.4: You are responsible for understanding how your content may be interpreted and for avoiding harmful, extremist, or unlawful implications.

prohibited.title: 5. Prohibited content and conduct
prohibited.body: You agree not to upload, publish, or transmit any content or engage in any conduct that is unlawful, harmful, or inconsistent with the nature of the Site. This includes, without limitation:

list.1: Content that promotes or supports terrorism, extremist ideology, hate groups, or violent organizations.
list.2: Content that incites violence, discrimination, harassment, or threats against any person or group.
list.3: Content that references or depicts real-world conflicts in a way that glorifies, justifies, or advocates participation in such conflicts.
list.4: Illegal content, including instructions for illegal acts, weapons trafficking, or evasion of law enforcement.
list.5: Personal data disclosure, doxxing, or invasions of privacy.
list.6: Impersonation, misrepresentation of identity, or false affiliation claims.
list.7: Malware, phishing, automated scraping, or attempts to disrupt Site security or availability.
list.8: Advertising or commercial solicitation without prior written permission from the Site administration.
list.9: Any content that infringes intellectual property rights or violates applicable law.

extremism.title: 6. Extremism, propaganda, and reputational risk
extremism.body: Because the Site relates to military simulation, you must not post content that could reasonably associate the Site, its administrators, or community with extremist ideology, propaganda, or real-world armed conflict. Any such association is strictly prohibited and may result in immediate removal of content and suspension of access.

moderation.title: 7. Moderation and enforcement
moderation.body: The administration may remove content, limit access, or suspend accounts at its discretion, without prior notice, if it believes content violates these Terms or creates legal, reputational, or safety risks for the community or Site.

license.title: 8. License to user content
license.body: By submitting User Content, you grant the Site a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, display, reproduce, and distribute that content solely for operating, moderating, and improving the Site. You retain ownership of your User Content.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual property
ip.body: All Site design, branding, and original materials are owned by Triad Tactics or its contributors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute Site materials without permission.

liability.title: 10. Disclaimers and limitation of liability
liability.body: The Site is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law:

list.1: We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose and non-infringement.
list.2: We are not responsible for any loss, damage, or legal exposure arising from User Content or your reliance on Site information.

changes.title: 11. Changes to the Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms at any time. The updated version becomes effective when published on the Site. Your continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

form.title: Application
form.subtitle: Complete the form below to apply for participation
form.requiredNote: All fields are required except Name
form.ageNote: We only accept applications from players 18+
form.decisionNote: Please answer the last two questions in detail - we decide who to invite based on them
form.name: Name
form.supportNote: If something goes wrong during submission, contact
form.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you
form.callsignHelp: Use only letters (A-Z), digits (0-9), and underscore (_).

callsignSection.title: Callsign
callsignSection.intro: We use your callsign in-game and in the community. Please read the rules below before submitting.

callsignRules.title: Callsign rules
callsignRules.allowedChars: Allowed characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9 and underscore (_). No spaces.
callsignRules.uniqueness: Must be unique and not confusingly similar to existing callsigns (exact match and sound/look match). Examples: Ghost vs G0st; Nikolai vs Nikolay; Alexey vs Aleksei.
callsignRules.neutral: Must not be political, religious, or advertising/brand-related.
callsignRules.noProjectSquads: Must not match existing squad names on the project.
callsignRules.noRealUnits: Must not reference real-world military units. Examples: 101st Airborne, 1st Marines, VDV, Spetsnaz.
callsignRules.noEquipment: Must not be real equipment/vehicles/weapons. Examples: AK-74, M4A1, BMP-2, Apache, Mi-24.
callsignRules.keepSimple: Keep it short and readable (ideally 1-2 words). Avoid long multi-word phrases.
callsignRules.adminNote: Even if the callsign is not perfect, the application may still be approved - but administrators can ask you to change it later.

callsignCheck.note: This is a helper hint. The final decision is made by an admin.

callsignSearch.title: Search existing callsigns
callsignSearch.help: Type a part of a callsign to see existing ones. This helps avoid duplicates before you choose.

form.availabilityHelp: Include days and time range (your local time)
form.steamIdHelp: Paste your Steam profile link (profiles/... or id/...). If your profile is public, we may verify Arma Reforger ownership automatically
form.experiencePlaceholder: Tell us about your Arma (A3/Reforger) experience and servers you played on, or your general gaming background
form.experienceHelp: Please answer in detail - this is one of the key questions for the invite decision
form.motivation: Why do you want to join Triad Tactics?
form.motivationPlaceholder: Tell us what you are looking for and what you want to contribute
form.motivationHelp: Please answer in detail - this is one of the key questions for the invite decision
form.steamRequiredNote: Please sign in with Steam before submitting
form.successMessage: Your application has been received. We will review it and contact you soon.

steamAuth.notConnected: Not connected. Please sign in with Steam to continue

scopeDisclaimer.title: Important
scopeDisclaimer.body: This application is for access to the Triad Tactics project. It does not mean you are applying to join the Triad Team squad.

detect.title: How ownership detection works
detect.profilePublic: Your Steam Profile must be Public.
detect.gameDetailsPublic: Your Game details must be Public (not hidden in Steam privacy settings).
detect.gameNotHidden: Arma Reforger must not be hidden on your Steam profile.
detect.delayAfterChange: If your account was private and you changed it to public, it may take some time before our website can see the change.
detect.canRehideAfterSubmit: After you submit the application, you can make your profile private again.
detect.incognitoCheck: To check if the game is detectable: open your Steam profile in an incognito/private window (logged out from Steam) and search for Arma Reforger in your games list. If you can find it there, the site will be able to find it too.

games.hubSubtitle: Browse the current operation, review the archive, and open any published or archived mission page.
games.currentDescriptionFallback: Mission briefing will appear here once the operation is fully prepared.
games.noCurrentText: When the next operation is published, it will appear here alongside the archive.
games.archiveSubtitle: Completed and canceled operations remain available as read-only records for approved players.
games.missionDescriptionFallback: Mission briefing will appear here once available.
games.localTimeHint: Times shown in your local time zone ({timezone})
games.slottingSubtitle: Mission layout, squads, and player-held priority slots.
games.slottingHeldEmpty: You do not currently hold a priority slot in this mission.
games.serverPreparingBody: The game server is still being set up. Connection details and passwords will appear here once the server is ready. Follow updates in Telegram and Discord.
games.serverSubtitle: Use Server name to find the server in Arma Reforger Server Browser.
games.directConnectSubtitle: For Direct Connect, enter Address and Port exactly as shown below.
games.missionAccessNoticeBody: To receive the gameplay password, you must be added to this mission before it starts. If you are not added to the mission, the gameplay password will not appear for you on this page.
games.missionAccessNoticeSquad: Squad players are added through pre-assigned squad slots and receive the password from their squad leader.
games.missionAccessNoticePriority: Priority players must claim an open priority slot on the slotting board.
games.missionAccessNoticeRegular: Regular players must use Join mission to enter the regular list before the mission starts.
games.passwordSubtitle: Mod-download password is visible to all approved players. Gameplay password will appear in this block before the game: squad members receive it from their squad leaders first, then priority players see it here, then regular-list players a few minutes later. Keep this page open and watch Discord and Telegram for updates.
games.passwordSquadNotice: If you are assigned to a squad slot, your squad leader will provide the password directly. Do not click Join mission or claim a priority slot — your gameplay slot is already reserved.
games.passwordSecurityNotice: Server passwords are confidential mission data. Sharing them with unauthorized people is forbidden and may result in penalties up to a permanent ban.
games.passwordMissedMissionStart: The mission has already started. You do not see the gameplay password because you were not added to the mission before the start.
games.passwordWaitingForAccessLevel: Password is not available for your access level yet (your access level: {accessLevel}). Please wait a little longer, the slotting and release process for other player categories is probably still in progress.
games.passwordRestrictedHidden: Slotting for your player category probably has not started yet.
games.statusArchivedCompleted: This mission is archived as completed and is now read-only.
games.statusArchivedCanceled: This mission is archived as canceled and is now read-only.
games.statusPriorityReleased: Priority gameplay access has been released.
games.statusRegularReleased: Regular gameplay access has been released.
games.statusViewerHasPriorityBadge: You are currently eligible for priority access.
games.missionUpdatesSubtitle: Latest operational updates from mission admins.
games.missionUpdateKindGameStartedWaitNextEpis: Game started. Please wait until Episode {nextEpisodeNumber} of {totalEpisodes} starts.
Game started. Please wait until the next episode starts.
games.missionUpdateKindGameStartedLastEpisode: Game started. This is the last episode.
games.regularJoinSubtitle: Joining this list does not guarantee a gameplay slot.
games.regularJoinWhoBody: Players who are not assigned to a squad and want to be included in the regular join queue for this mission.
games.regularJoinWhyBody: When available, this button adds your callsign to the regular join list. When admins release regular gameplay access, players who are on this list at that moment receive the gameplay password.
games.regularJoinWhyBodyHidden: The Join mission button appears only when you are eligible to join the regular list.
games.regularJoinUnavailableTitle: Why the Join mission button is hidden
games.regularJoinUnavailableArchived: This mission is archived and read-only.
games.regularJoinUnavailableMissedWindow: The mission is already past the join stage. You were not added to the mission in time, so regular join is no longer available.
games.regularJoinUnavailableHeldSlot: You already hold a mission slot. Leave that slot first if you need regular join instead.
games.regularJoinUnavailableAlreadyJoined: You are already on the regular join list. Use Leave mission if you want to remove yourself.
games.regularJoinUnavailableClosed: Regular join is currently closed by mission settings.
games.regularJoinUnavailableGeneric: Join mission is unavailable for your current mission state.
games.regularJoinWaiting: You can view the list of regular joiners here.
games.regularJoinNone: No one has joined the regular list yet.
games.regularJoinRosterHint: Click to show or hide the list
games.regularJoinModalIntro: Regular join is only for players who are not assigned to squads and are not using priority slot claiming.
games.regularJoinModalWarningBody: Joining the regular list does not guarantee you a gameplay slot, but you will still see the mission password on this page before the game.
games.regularJoinModalGuaranteeBody: If you need a guaranteed slot, you must either earn a priority badge (for example, by helping with server testing) or be assigned to one of the official Triad Tactics squads shown on this mission's slotting board.
games.regularJoinModalNoSquadCheckbox: I confirm I am not assigned to a squad. If I am assigned, I will wait for my squad leader to provide the password.
games.regularJoinModalPriorityInfo: You have a priority badge for this mission. Scroll to the slotting board at the end of the page and claim a priority slot there. The Join mission button is for regular players.
games.regularJoinModalPriorityCheckbox: I understand this and still want to join the regular list (for example, no priority slots are available or I intentionally skip priority claiming).
games.actionGenericError: Action failed. Refresh the page and try again.
games.actionSlotTaken: That slot has already been taken.
games.actionClaimConflict: Someone else claimed that slot first. Refresh to see the latest board.
games.actionAlreadyHasSlot: You already hold a slot in this mission.
games.actionBadgeRequired: You do not have the required priority badge for that slot.
games.actionPrioritySlotAvailable: Priority slots are still available, so regular fallback is not open for you yet.
games.actionNoCurrentSlot: You no longer hold a priority slot to switch from.
games.actionNoHeldPrioritySlot: You no longer hold a priority slot to leave.
games.actionSwitchConflict: That slot changed before your switch completed. Refresh to see the latest board.
games.actionLeaveConflict: Your slot changed before leave completed. Refresh to see the latest board.
games.actionMissionNotFound: This mission could not be found anymore.
games.confirmSwitchText: Your current slot will be released immediately. Another player may claim it before the switch completes.
games.confirmLeaveText: Your slot will be released immediately. Another player may claim it and you could lose your position. If the mission has already started, you will no longer be able to see the gameplay password.
games.confirmLeaveRegularText: You will be removed from the regular list immediately. If the mission has already started, you will no longer be able to see the gameplay password.
games.guideIntro: A quick overview of player categories, the slotting board, and how passwords are distributed.
games.guideProcessBody: After a mission is published, the administrator pre-assigns squad slots on the slotting board. Priority players can then claim open slots, and regular players can join the regular list. Before game time, passwords are released in stages so everyone can connect to the server.
games.guideSquadBody: These are members of official Triad Tactics squads. Their slots are pre-assigned on the slotting board and marked with the squad's tag. Squad members do not need to join the regular list or claim priority slots — their commander will provide the password directly. If you see your squad tag on the board, just wait for your leader's instructions.
games.guidePriorityBody: Priority players hold a special badge earned through contributions such as server testing or event support. They can claim any open priority slot on the slotting board before the game. Priority players see the gameplay password earlier than regular players.
games.guideRegularBody: Regular players join the regular list using the Join mission button. Being on the list does not guarantee a slot, but when admins release regular access, everyone on the list at that moment receives the gameplay password. If you want a guaranteed slot, earn a priority badge or join one of the squads.
games.guidePasswordsBody:
There are two passwords:
• Mod-download password — released first so all approved players can download the required mods.
• Gameplay password — released closer to game time, first to squad members (via their leaders), then to priority players, and finally to regular players.
Passwords appear in the Server section of this page when they become available for your category.
games.guideServerPreparingTitle: Why server details may be hidden
games.guideServerPreparingBody: Sometimes a mission is published before the game server is fully ready. In that case, the Server section shows a "server is being prepared" notice. Connection details and passwords will appear automatically once the server is set up. Follow Telegram and Discord for real-time updates.

welcome.aboutP1: Triad Tactics is an Arma Reforger project focused on immersive, teamwork-driven military operations inside the game. Our goal is to deliver sessions that feel structured and believable: carefully prepared scenarios, authentic loadouts, vehicles, and a environment.
welcome.aboutP2: The server is created and maintained by Triad Team. We welcome players from all over the world - we’ll help you get settled and feel at home in our community.

highlights.1: Mission scenarios with an emphasis on tactics and coordination
highlights.2: Period-appropriate gear and vehicles for each scenario
highlights.3: Friendly community and support for new players

welcome.gallerySubtitle: A few moments from our sessions

2.videoAlt: Triad Tactics Arma Reforger server gameplay video

community.title: Join the community
community.subtitle: Stay connected between sessions and get updates in real time.

upcomingGames.localTimeHint: Times shown in your local time zone ({timezone})
upcomingGames.descriptionFallback: Published mission details are available through the Games hub for approved members.

welcome.disclaimerText: Triad Tactics is a gaming project within Arma Reforger. We do not support, promote, or justify real-world war, violence, or hatred, and we do not create missions that depict ongoing real-world conflicts.
